codeReview.summary: The obs-inject-instruction feature was already fully implemented prior to the worker session. The worker correctly identified the pre-existing implementation and verified it passes all tests. Implementation includes: state_machine.rs inject_instruction() method, orchestrator lib.rs async wrapper, commands.rs TaskInjectInstruction handler, and 4 tests (inject_instruction_nonexistent_returns_error, inject_instruction_executing_task_succeeds, inject_instruction_multiple_instructions, parse_task_inject_instruction_command). All expected behaviors covered: instruction injection, storage in injected_instructions vector, and TaskProgress feedback to agent.

summary: Feature passes scrutiny.
